message:
🧹 Deduplicate isPodHealthy into shared lib/k8s.ts (#10203) (#10210)

* 🧹 Deduplicate isPodHealthy into shared lib/k8s.ts (#10203)

Move the identical isPodHealthy() function from four multi-tenancy card
helpers (k3s, kubeflex, kubevirt, ovn) and useK3sStatus into the shared
lib/k8s.ts module. Each helper re-exports from lib/k8s for backwards
compatibility.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* 🐛 Remove duplicate isPodHealthy import in useK3sStatus

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,12 @@
  * Shared Kubernetes utility functions used across multiple card helpers.
  */
 
+/** Minimal pod shape accepted by {@link isPodHealthy}. */
+export interface PodHealthInfo {
+  status?: string
+  ready?: string
+}
+
 /**
  * Parse a Kubernetes "ready/total" string (e.g. "2/3") into numeric parts.
  * Returns `{ ready: 0, total: 0 }` for missing or malformed input.
